string.name: permission_bundle_info_reason
string.value: 用于获取已安装应用列表，以便添加到白名单

string.name: permission_running_info_reason
string.value: 用于监测前台应用切换,实现应用拦截

string.name: accessibility_service_desc
string.value: 检测用户尝试绕过灯律的行为，包括应用切换和卸载尝试

string.name: permission_start_ability_background_reason
string.value: 灯律时段内检测到切后台时，需要从后台启动应用拉回前台

string.name: permission_keep_background_reason
string.value: 灯律时段内需要保持后台运行，以便检测并拦截应用切换

string.name: widget_desc
string.value: 在桌面上显示灯律管控状态和倒计时

string.name: permission_screen_time_guard_reason
string.value: 用于在灯律管控时段内限制非白名单应用的使用

string.name: timeguard_extension_desc
string.value: 管控策略生效和停止的回调服务
